title: workspace.json
description: workspace.json v0.1 — open specification for AI agent workspace context. All top-level sections are optional.

ManualSection.description: Developer-authored context about the workspace. Consumers SHOULD treat this section as trusted human documentation.

description.description: Human-readable description of the repository. SHOULD be 1–3 sentences.

techStack.description: Major frameworks, runtimes, and tools used in this workspace.

conventions.description: Actionable rules for agents working in this codebase. Each entry SHOULD be a single rule.

fragileFiles.description: Files that require special care — high blast radius, known instability, or manual annotation.

coChangePatterns.description: Groups of files that must change together. Used to warn agents of cascading update requirements.

GeneratedSection.description: Machine-generated workspace intelligence. Developers SHOULD NOT edit this section manually.

version.description: Schema version. MUST be "1.0" for v0.1-compliant files.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was generated.

fileIndex.description: Map of relative file path → file-level intelligence. Keys MUST use forward slashes and be relative to the repository root.

frameworkManifest.description: Detected frameworks, runtimes, and major libraries.

AgentsSection.description: References to agent context files present in the repository.

toolAgentFiles.description: Tool-specific agent instruction files (.cursorrules, .windsurfrules, copilot-instructions.md, etc.).

primaryAgentFile.description: The single agent file recommended for general-purpose AI agent consumers. SHOULD be "AGENTS.md" when present.

HealthSection.description: Workspace-level intelligence state. Computation methodology is implementation-defined; treat numeric fields as opaque signals within their documented ranges.

intelligenceState.description: Stage of intelligence accumulation. Consumers SHOULD surface this to developers when not STEADY_STATE.

observationCount.description: Number of change events observed by the generator.

averageFragility.description: Mean fragility score across all observed files (0–1).

fragileFileCount.description: Count of files with fragility at or above the generator's threshold.

confidence.description: Generator confidence in the health signals (0–1).

bootstrapOverride.description: When > 0, some scores are based on priors rather than observed data (0–1).

structuralPhase.description: [experimental] Estimated structural lifecycle phase of the project.

llmContextStaleness.description: [experimental] Estimated fraction of LLM-facing context that has changed since the last agent session.

FragileFileEntry.description: A file flagged for special care.

path.description: Relative path from repository root (forward slashes).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the file requires care.

CoChangePattern.description: A group of files that must be updated together.

files.description: Relative paths of files in the co-change group.

note.description: Human-readable explanation of why these files change together.

FileIndexEntry.description: Intelligence data for a single observed file.

fragility.description: Composite fragility score (0–1). Higher values indicate files that change more disruptively.

FrameworkEntry.description: A detected framework, runtime, or major library.

detected.description: Source file or heuristic used for detection (e.g. "package.json", "Cargo.toml").
